items.content: Israeli journalist and writer, Gideon Levy, says the decision to end the Iran war rests only with US President Trump.

clusters.title: John Lewis to pay first staff bonus for four years
clusters.neutral_headline: John Lewis Pays First Staff Bonus In Years

items.title: John Lewis to pay first staff bonus for four years
items.standfirst: The department store and Waitrose supermarket owner will give workers a bonus equivalent to an extra week's pay.
items.content: The department store and Waitrose supermarket owner will give workers a bonus equivalent to an extra week's pay.

items.title: John Lewis pays first annual staff bonus in four years as profits rise
items.standfirst: Payment of 2% at employee-owned partnership follows sales increase to £13.4bnThe owner of John Lewis and Waitrose has paid an annual bonus to workers for the first time in four years after underlying profits rose by 6%.The retail group’s 69,000 employees – which it calls partners – will share £35m, the equivalent of 2% of salary, after it recorded an increase in sales and profits. The payout amounts to about one extra week of pay. Continue reading...
items.content: Payment of 2% at employee-owned partnership follows sales increase to £13.4bnThe owner of John Lewis and Waitrose has paid an annual bonus to workers for the first time in four years after underlying profits rose by 6%.The retail group’s 69,000 employees – which it calls partners – will share £35m, the equivalent of 2% of salary, after it recorded an increase in sales and profits. The payout amounts to about one extra week of pay. Continue reading...

ai_summary: John Lewis pays bonus to employees
Bonus equivalent to one weeks pay
Profits rose at the company
Sales increased to 13 billion pounds
Employees will share 35 million pounds

items.title: U.S. likely responsible for strike on Iranian school
items.standfirst: Four sources familiar say a preliminary US Military investigation finds the US is likely to blame for that deadly strike on a school in Iran that killed 170 people, mostly children. NBC News' Courtney Kube has the story.

clusters.title: Iran’s sea mines raise fears of Strait of Hormuz oil disruption
clusters.neutral_headline: Iran May Deploy Sea Mines In Strait

items.title: Iran’s sea mines raise fears of Strait of Hormuz oil disruption
items.standfirst: Tehran may seek to choke off oil traffic through the vital Strait of Hormuz following US and Israeli strikes on Iran, raising fears it could deploy sea mines, officials say. President Donald Trump said US forces struck 28 Iranian mine-laying vessels as concerns grow over threats to the strategic shipping lane.

The feature surfaced AI generated feedback framed as coming from real writers and academics…
items.content: What happened and why it matters A recently launched Grammarly capability that presented editing suggestions "inspired by" named authors and experts provoked a sharp backlash and has triggered legal action. items.title: Grammarly Is Facing a Class Action Lawsuit Over Its AI ‘Expert Review’ Feature
items.standfirst: The feature, which Grammarly shut down Wednesday, presented editing suggestions as if they came from established authors and academics—without their consent.
items.content: The feature, which Grammarly shut down Wednesday, presented editing suggestions as if they came from established authors and academics—without their consent.
